title: Multi-Agent AI Frameworks 2026: LangGraph vs CrewAI vs OpenAI SDK vs the Field
cluster: multi-agent frameworks comparison LangGraph CrewAI OpenAI SDK 2026
meta_description: Which multi-agent AI framework should your team actually ship with in 2026? Compare LangGraph, CrewAI, OpenAI Agents SDK, Google ADK, AutoGen/AG2, and Claude Agent SDK across state management, MCP support, learning curve, and production readiness. Includes decision framework for CTOs and engineering leads.
